title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 210.100 - Violation a misdemeanor
text:
210.100.  Violation a misdemeanor. — Any person violating any of the provisions of sections 210.070 to 210.090 shall be deemed guilty of a misdemeanor.
(RSMo 1939 § 9997, A. 1949 S.B. 1065 § 210.10) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9127; 1919 § 7342; 1909 § 8323
